project_type: pnpm monorepo with 3 target apps: quantube (React + Fastify), quantmax (Next.js 15 + Fastify), quantai (Next.js 15 + Fastify)
build_system: pnpm workspaces + Turborepo. Each app has its own typecheck/lint scripts. Root scripts: pnpm lint, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm build.
build_command: pnpm --filter @quant/quantai typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/quantmax typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/quantube typecheck
test_command: pnpm --filter @quant/quantai test && pnpm --filter @quant/quantmax test && pnpm --filter @quant/quantube test
verification_instructions: Run typecheck for each app. In this monorepo, tsc --noEmit from within each app directory validates both frontend and backend TS. Lint with eslint.
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install. This installs all workspace dependencies.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can install packages. Node 22 with pnpm available. React 18 in quantube, React 19 in quantmax/quantai. @quant/brand is a workspace package already set up with path alias.
contribution_requirements: Do NOT modify packages/brand, packages/shared-ui, CI configs, or other apps outside quantube/quantmax/quantai. One app per PR.
key_patterns: Apps already use React Query hooks for data fetching. API clients exist in src/services/api-client.ts. Pages use @quant/shared-ui components (LoadingState, ErrorState, EmptyState, AppShell, Sidebar). Brand package exports colors, typography, motion, themes, app configs. quantai already has tailwind with dark mode class strategy and CSS vars from globals.css. quantmax uses globals.css with tailwind. quantube is backend-first with React components but no Next.js/tailwind setup.
directory_structure: Each app has: src/components/ (React components), src/hooks/ (React Query hooks), src/pages/ or src/app/ (page routes), src/services/api-client.ts (API client), backend/ (Fastify routes + services), src/mobile/ (mobile-specific modules), src/__tests__/ (unit tests). Brand package at packages/brand/src/ with colors, motion, themes, typography, tokens, icons, logos.
